content.query:
SELECT
[_ad_id] as AdID
,[_creative_id] as CreativeID
,[_adset_id] as AdsetID
,[_campaign_id] as CampaignID
,[_account_id] as AccountID
,[_ad_name] as AdName
,[_bid_type] as BidType
,[_status] as Status
,[_configured_status] as ConfiguredStatus
,[_effective_status] as EffectiveStatus
,[_created_time] as CreatedTime
,[_updated_time] as UpdatedTime
,[_conversion_specs] as ConversionSpecs
,[_tracking_specs] as TrackingSpecs
,[_display_sequence] as DisplaySequence
,[_recommendations] as Recommendations
,[_source_ad_id] as SourceAdID
,[_last_updated_by_app_id] as LastUpdatedByAppID
 FROM [RIVERY].[fb_ads_ads]
